base: Build a game called 'Breakout'. The player controls a paddle that moves left and right along the bottom of a play area using the A and D keys. A ball bounces between the paddle, the side and top walls, and a grid of bricks at the top. Each brick disappears when hit by the ball. The player wins by clearing all bricks. The player loses if the ball falls past the paddle. Display a score and a win/lose screen when the game ends.

perScenario.opencode-plain: Using Babylon.js 8 (already loaded from CDN in index.html), write the entire game in game.js. Do not edit index.html.
perScenario.opencode-roblox: Using Roblox Studio via the provided MCP tools, build the game in a blank baseplate place. Place all code in ServerScriptService or StarterPlayerScripts as appropriate.
